title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 300.080 - Obedience to police and fire department officials
text:
300.080.  Obedience to police and fire department officials. — No person shall knowingly fail or refuse to comply with any lawful order or direction of a police officer or fire department official.
(L. 1965 p. 445 § 16, A.L. 2002 H.B. 1270 and H.B. 2032)
